قم ببناء تطبيق ويب متكامل (Full-Stack Web Application) يدعم اللغة العربية بالكامل (RTL) ويوفر تجربة استخدام سهلة ومريحة. المشروع عبارة عن منصة اجتماعية مخصصة لربط الطلاب المكفوفين في "الجامعة الأردنية" (أو أولياء أمورهم) بالمتطوعين داخل الجامعة لتقديم المساعدة.

أدوار المستخدمين (User Roles):

الطالب الكفيف / ولي الأمر (Student/Parent).

المتطوع (Volunteer).

الميزات الأساسية المطلوبة (Core Features):

1. نظام المصادقة وإدارة الحسابات (Authentication & Profiles):

تسجيل الدخول وإنشاء الحسابات لكلا الدورين يجب أن يتم باستخدام رقم الهاتف وكلمة المرور.

ملف الطالب الكفيف: عند إنشاء حساب طالب، يجب جمع وعرض بياناته الأساسية والتي تشمل: (الاسم الرباعي، والتخصص الجامعي).

2. نظام الحجز والطلبات (خاص بالطلاب وأولياء الأمور):

إنشاء صفحة حجز مخصصة لولي الأمر أو الطالب لطلب المساعدة.

يجب أن يحتوي نموذج الطلب على حقل إلزامي لـ (اسم المادة).

يجب إضافة خيار (Checkbox أو Toggle) يحدد ما إذا كان الطلب مخصصاً لـ "تقديم امتحان".

في حال تفعيل خيار "تقديم امتحان"، يجب أن تظهر حقول إضافية ديناميكية لتحديد: (موعد الامتحان "التاريخ والوقت"، ومكان قاعة الامتحان).

3. لوحة المتطوعين (Volunteer Dashboard):

صفحة رئيسية للمتطوع تظهر بعد تسجيل الدخول، تعرض قائمة (Feed) بجميع طلبات المساعدة المتاحة والنشطة.

يجب أن يظهر في كل طلب تفاصيله (اسم الطالب، المادة، وإذا كان امتحاناً يظهر الموعد والمكان).

زر "تطوع الآن" بجانب كل طلب لتمكين المتطوع من قبول الطلب وتأكيد تقديم المساعدة.

المتطلبات التقنية وتجربة المستخدم (Technical & UX Requirements):

سهولة الوصول (Accessibility): نظراً لطبيعة الموقع، يجب أن تكون واجهة المستخدم متوافقة تماماً مع برامج قراءة الشاشة (Screen Readers)، واستخدام تباين ألوان واضح، وأزرار كبيرة وسهلة النقر.

التصميم (UI): تصميم متجاوب (Responsive) يعمل بشكل ممتاز على الهواتف المحمولة (Mobile-First) نظراً لأن أغلب المستخدمين سيصلون للموقع عبر هواتفهم.

البيانات (Database): قم بإنشاء نماذج قواعد البيانات اللازمة (Users, Requests) لربط المتطوعين بالطلبات بشكل صحيح.

يرجى اختيار حزمة برمجية مناسبة (Tech Stack) بناءً على أفضل الممارسات، وتجهيز البيئة (Frontend, Backend, Database) مع كتابة الأكواد اللازمة لتشغيل الموقع بشكل مباشر.

openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  # Do not change the title, if the title changes, the import paths will be broken
  title: Api
  version: 0.1.0
  description: API specification for the University of Jordan Volunteer Platform
servers:
  - url: /api
    description: Base API path
tags:
  - name: health
    description: Health operations
  - name: auth
    description: Authentication and account management
  - name: requests
    description: Help request operations
paths:
  /healthz:
    get:
      operationId: healthCheck
      tags: [health]
      summary: Health check
      description: Returns server health status
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthStatus"

  /auth/register:
    post:
      operationId: register
      tags: [auth]
      summary: Register a new user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/RegisterInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: User created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AuthResponse"
        "400":
          description: Validation error
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
        "409":
          description: Phone already registered
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"

  /auth/login:
    post:
      operationId: login
      tags: [auth]
      summary: Login with phone and password
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/LoginInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Login successful
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AuthResponse"
        "401":
          description: Invalid credentials
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"

  /auth/logout:
    post:
      operationId: logout
      tags: [auth]
      summary: Logout current user
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Logged out
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SuccessResponse"

  /auth/me:
    get:
      operationId: getMe
      tags: [auth]
      summary: Get current authenticated user
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Current user
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"
        "401":
          description: Not authenticated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"

  /requests:
    get:
      operationId: listRequests
      tags: [requests]
      summary: List all active help requests
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [open, accepted, completed]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of requests
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/HelpRequest"
    post:
      operationId: createRequest
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Create a new help request
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/HelpRequestInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Request created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HelpRequest"
        "400":
          description: Validation error
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"

  /requests/summary:
    get:
      operationId: getRequestsSummary
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Get summary stats for requests dashboard
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Summary statistics
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RequestsSummary"

  /requests/my:
    get:
      operationId: getMyRequests
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Get requests created by the current student
      responses:
        "200":
          description: My requests
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/HelpRequest"

  /requests/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getRequest
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Get a specific help request
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The request
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HelpRequest"
        "404":
          description: Not found
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"

  /requests/{id}/volunteer:
    post:
      operationId: volunteerForRequest
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Volunteer accepts a help request
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Successfully volunteered
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HelpRequest"
        "400":
          description: Request already accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
        "404":
          description: Not found
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"

components:
  schemas:
    HealthStatus:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
      required:
        - status

    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      properties:

      required:

    SuccessResponse:
      type: object

    User:

    RegisterInput:
      type: object
      properties:
        phone:
          type: string
        password:

        role:
          type: string
          enum: [student, volunteer]
        fullName:
          type: string
        major:
          type: string
      required:
        - phone
        - password

    LoginInput:
      type: object
      properties:
        phone:
          type: string
        password:
          type: string
      required:
        - phone
        - password

    HelpRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        studentId:
          type: integer
        studentName:
          type: string
        studentMajor:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        volunteerId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        volunteerName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        subjectName:

        isExam:
          type: boolean
        examDate:

        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
      required:
        - id
        - studentId
        - studentName
        - subjectName
        - isExam
        - status
        - createdAt

    HelpRequestInput:
      type: object
      properties:
        subjectName:
          type: string
        isExam:
          type: boolean
        examDate:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        examLocation:
          type: string
        notes:
          type: string
      required:
        - subjectName
        - isExam

    RequestsSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        totalOpen:
          type: integer
        totalAccepted:
          type: integer
        totalCompleted:
          type: integer
        recentRequests:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/HelpRequest"
      required:
        - totalOpen
        - totalAccepted
        - totalCompleted
        - recentRequests

arguments.code:
await startAsyncSubagent({
    specialization: "DESIGN",
    task: `
Build a full-stack Arabic RTL web application: "منصة التطوع - الجامعة الأردنية" (University of Jordan Volunteer Platform).

**Product identity**: A compassionate, community-driven platform connecting blind students at the University of Jordan with student volunteers. Every pixel should communicate trust, warmth, and dignity — built for people who depend on it. The product is fully in Arabic, RTL direction, and must feel native to Arabic UX conventions.

**Vibe**: Warm, spacious, and trustworthy — like a helping hand extended across a courtyard. High contrast, serene, and uncluttered. Not cold or clinical. The app should feel like something built with care by people who genuinely want to help.

**CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:**
- The entire UI must be in Arabic (no English text visible to users)
- Set \`dir="rtl"\` and \`lang="ar"\` on the \`<html>\` element in \`index.html\`
- All text content, labels, buttons, placeholders — everything in Arabic
- Use a font that supports Arabic beautifully (add Google Fonts link in index.html: Noto Sans Arabic or Cairo)
- Layout must be RTL: flex row-reverse, text-right, etc. — handle RTL properly
- ACCESSIBILITY: Large touch targets (min 48px), ARIA labels in Arabic, high contrast (WCAG AA), semantic HTML, proper heading hierarchy, role="main", labels linked to inputs

**Pages and routes:**

- \`/login\` — Login page (phone + password), links to register
- \`/register\` — Registration page with role selection (student vs volunteer), phone, password, full name; if student: also major field
- \`/student\` — Student/Parent dashboard: shows their own requests list + button to create new request
- \`/student/new-request\` — New request form: subject name (required), exam toggle (checkbox/switch), when exam toggled ON → show exam date/time picker + exam location field. Submit button.
- \`/volunteer\` — Volunteer dashboard: a feed of ALL open requests. Each card shows: student name, major, subject, whether it's an exam (with date/time and location if so), status badge. "تطوع الآن" (Volunteer Now) button on each card.
- \`/\` — redirect to /login if not authenticated, or to appropriate dashboard based on role

**State management**: Use React state/context for auth. On login/register success, store user from API response and redirect to correct dashboard. The API sets a session cookie, so subsequent requests will be authenticated automatically.

**Data types:**
- User: { id, phone, role: "student"|"volunteer", fullName, major?, createdAt }
- HelpRequest: { id, studentId, studentName, studentMajor?, volunteerId?, volunteerName?, subjectName, isExam, examDate?, examLocation?, status: "open"|"accepted"|"completed", notes?, createdAt }
- RequestsSummary: { totalOpen, totalAccepted, totalCompleted, recentRequests: HelpRequest[] }

**Available API hooks (import from \`@workspace/api-client-react\`, NOT relative paths):**
\`\`\`
useRegister() — mutation: { data: RegisterInput } → AuthResponse
useLogin() — mutation: { data: LoginInput } → AuthResponse
useLogout() — mutation → SuccessResponse
useGetMe() — query: current user or 401
useListRequests(params?, options?) — query: HelpRequest[] — params can have { status: "open"|"accepted"|"completed" }
  queryKey helper: getListRequestsQueryKey(params?)
useCreateRequest() — mutation: { data: HelpRequestInput } → HelpRequest
useGetRequestsSummary() — query: RequestsSummary
  queryKey helper: getGetRequestsSummaryQueryKey()
useGetMyRequests() — query: HelpRequest[] (current student's requests)
  queryKey helper: getGetMyRequestsQueryKey()
useGetRequest(id, options?) — query: HelpRequest by id
  queryKey helper: getGetRequestQueryKey(id)
useVolunteerForRequest() — mutation: { id: number } → HelpRequest
\`\`\`

Hook integration rules:
- Import hooks from \`@workspace/api-client-react\`, never from relative paths
- Create all new files BEFORE importing them
- Hooks return T directly (not wrapped)
- Query hook options pattern: \`useGetMe({ query: { queryKey: getGetMeQueryKey() } })\`
- Mutations: \`useVolunteerForRequest().mutate({ id: requestId })\`
- Only import what you use

**UX requirements:**
- After login/register: redirect student → /student, volunteer → /volunteer
- Volunteer "تطوع الآن" button: on click calls \`useVolunteerForRequest\` then invalidates \`getListRequestsQueryKey\` cache
- Exam fields appear/hide dynamically based on the isExam toggle state
- Empty states with helpful Arabic messages
- Loading spinners/skeletons while data fetches
- Error messages in Arabic when API calls fail
- Toast notifications for success/error actions
- No emojis anywhere in the UI
- Large, tappable buttons (mobile-first)

**Do not use emojis anywhere in the UI.**
Use ALL provided hooks to build a rich, functional app.
Prioritize clarity and polish — this app is used by people with visual impairments and their helpers. Make deliberate color choices with strong contrast. Prioritize accessibility above all design decisions.

# منصة التطوع - الجامعة الأردنية

منصة اجتماعية تربط الطلاب المكفوفين في الجامعة الأردنية بالمتطوعين لتقديم المساعدة.

## Run & Operate

- `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev` — run the API server (port 5000)
- `pnpm --filter @workspace/jordan-volunteer run dev` — run the frontend
- `pnpm run typecheck` — full typecheck across all packages
- `pnpm run build` — typecheck + build all packages
- `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen` — regenerate API hooks and Zod schemas from the OpenAPI spec
- `pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push` — push DB schema changes (dev only)
- Required env: `DATABASE_URL` — Postgres connection string
- Required env: `SESSION_SECRET` — Secret for express-session

## Stack

- pnpm workspaces, Node.js 24, TypeScript 5.9
- Frontend: React + Vite, Tailwind CSS, Arabic RTL, Cairo font
- API: Express 5, express-session, bcryptjs
- DB: PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
- Validation: Zod (`zod/v4`), `drizzle-zod`
- API codegen: Orval (from OpenAPI spec)
- Build: esbuild (CJS bundle)

## Where things live

- `lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml` — single source of truth for API contracts
- `lib/db/src/schema/users.ts` — users table (phone, password_hash, role, full_name, major)
- `lib/db/src/schema/help-requests.ts` — help_requests table
- `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/` — Express route handlers
- `artifacts/jordan-volunteer/src/` — React frontend (Arabic RTL)

## Architecture decisions

- Session-based auth (express-session + cookie) — simple and works well with RTL Arabic UX
- Password hashed with bcryptjs (10 rounds)
- Two user roles: `student` (or parent) and `volunteer`
- Help requests have optional exam fields that only apply when `isExam: true`
- All UI text is Arabic; `dir="rtl"` set on html element

## Product

- Students/parents register and submit help requests (subject name, optional exam details)
- Volunteers see a live feed of open requests and can click "تطوع الآن" to accept
- Fully accessible: large touch targets, ARIA labels, high contrast

## Seed accounts (password: password123)

- Student: 0791000001 (محمد علي السلامة)
- Student: 0791000002 (سارة أحمد المصري)
- Volunteer: 0791000003 (خالد يوسف الحمد)
- Volunteer: 0791000004 (نور إبراهيم عبدالله)

## User preferences

- Full Arabic RTL interface
- Mobile-first design
- High accessibility standards (screen readers, high contrast)

## Gotchas

- SESSION_SECRET env var must be set or the API server will throw on startup
- After OpenAPI spec changes, always run codegen before building frontend
- `pnpm run typecheck:libs` must run before artifact typechecks when lib schemas change

## Pointers

- See the `pnpm-workspace` skill for workspace structure, TypeScript setup, and package details

Please implement the following bug fixes and new features for the Volunteer Dashboard:

1. Fix "Volunteer Now" Bug & Update Flow:

The Bug: Clicking the "تطوع الآن" (Volunteer Now) button currently throws a false error stating the request might already be taken. Please debug and fix the state/API response causing this.

The New Flow: Change the button's behavior. Clicking "تطوع الآن" should NOT just instantly assign the request. Instead, it must open a UI Modal/Dialog overlay.

2. Create the Contact Modal (UI):

Inside the new Modal, display the following details of the specific request and the blind student who posted it:

اسم الطالب (Student Name)

الجامعة (University)

المادة (Subject)

رقم الهاتف (Phone Number)

WhatsApp Action Button: Inside the Modal, add a primary button with the text "تواصل عبر واتساب" (Contact via WhatsApp) and a WhatsApp icon.

Make this button an external link that dynamically uses the student's phone number. Format the link as [https://wa.me/962](https://wa.me/962){phone_number} (assuming standard Jordanian 07xxxxxxxx numbers, strip the leading '0' and append it to the country code '962'). Make sure it opens in a new tab (target="_blank").

3. Backend Request Filtering (University Matching):

The Logic: Volunteers should only see requests from their own university.

Update the backend API endpoint that fetches the feed of active requests for the Volunteer Dashboard.

Add a database query filter so that it compares the logged-in volunteer's university field with the request creator's university field.

Return ONLY the requests where request.university === current_user.university.<attached_contents>
